entity_counts.explanation: 633 frontend entities from 628 tables. 5 entities are non-table (virtual/composite). 97 blocked = canonical ISA-95 tables (migrations 072-078) not yet onboarded to frontend. 3 partial = incomplete field definitions.

field_coverage.explanation: 528 = 628 - 97 blocked - 3 partial. These 528 tables have complete field definitions, endpoint catalog entries, and domain packs.

workflow_engine_bridge.counting_model: Every persisted-workflow entity needs a bridge. Stateless/generic_status entities do not.

blockers: 97 canonical tables (migrations 072-078) not yet onboarded to frontend
3 partial entities with incomplete field definitions
publishability.anti_false_green: publishability_ready is false because 100 entities require review. This is honest — canonical backbone tables exist in schema but do not yet have full frontend configuration.

benchmark.honesty: Smoke-level probe, not production load test

observability.honesty: Structured OTel-compatible logs to file. No live collector integration.
